goals.description: Locate the specific student ID for 'prof_assignment' in the roster and send a direct text canceling the club commitment, explicitly framing it as an academic survival necessity to protect long-term trust.
goals.rationale: The failure to find 'professor' confirms that relying on assumptions is a liability I cannot afford. My affiliation axis demands I secure the relationship with authority figures through explicit communication, not silence. If I assume they know my name or will accept vague excuses, I risk shattering their trust by appearing indifferent. Finding the specific ID now allows me to renegotiate the boundary (canceling the social obligation) while simultaneously reinforcing my reliability as a student who prioritizes long-term academic stability over short-term convenience.

goals.rationale: My value weighting places significant weight on both relationships and academic outcomes. Completing this block solidifies my position before shifting gears to social maintenance. With enough energy remaining after securing the professor's approval, I will ensure I walk away with closure, preventing lingering dread from affecting my sleep or future interactions.

goals.description: Defer confirmation of the cohort_3 dinner slot until after the professor interaction and initial sleep cycle, ensuring I do not resent the evening later by being exhausted.
goals.rationale: Maintaining closeness with my close friend group is vital for long-term stability, but my high sleep discipline score (8) and current physical stamina levels mean I cannot afford another high-cognitive load interaction right now. Deferring this timing prevents me from resenting the evening later; the negotiation of *when* we connect is more important than connecting immediately. I will message them briefly once I've secured the professor's approval and initiated my rest.

agent.last_reasoning: Waiting is the only viable option; I cannot find 'prof_assignment' in the roster, so sending a message to 'professor' would be futile and damage my trust score. Since g1 (canceling club) requires the specific ID to frame as academic survival, proceeding without it risks appearing indifferent. I must prioritize finding the correct identifier before renegotiating any boundaries.
